action_set_definitions.name: query_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the global status of the environment, including current time, active runways, and weather conditions.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_radar_targets
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all aircraft currently within the sector's radar coverage.

action_set_definitions.name: get_aircraft_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed flight parameters for a specific aircraft using its callsign.

callsign.description: The unique callsign of the aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_separation
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the distance and relative bearing between two specific aircraft to ensure legal separation.

primary_callsign.description: The callsign of the trailing aircraft.

target_callsign.description: The callsign of the lead aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_vector_command
action_set_definitions.description: Issues a flight instruction to change heading, altitude, or speed for an aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: authorize_visual_approach
action_set_definitions.description: Clears an aircraft for a visual approach behind a specific lead aircraft on a specific runway.

wake_cautionary.description: Whether to issue a wake turbulence warning.

state_description.current_time_step: The current simulation clock in minutes from start.
state_description.active_runways: List of available runways and their current occupancy status.
state_description.aircraft_in_sector: List of aircraft currently under control with their flight parameters.
